description: The planner agent's structured decomposition of the design document. The NUMBER of units is decided here at runtime by the planner, not hardcoded.

units.description: The independent units of work the design decomposes into.

unit_id.description: Stable slug for this unit, unique within the plan (e.g. `u1` or `glossary-shard`).

goal.description: What this unit must produce, in one or two sentences.

inputs.description: The facts, requirements, or upstream results this unit needs.

depends_on.description: unit_ids that must complete before this unit starts. Empty for independent units.

rationale.description: Why the design was decomposed this way.

recommended_reviewers_per_unit.description: How many independent reviewers each unit warrants (clamped to 1..3 by the workflow).
